meta.title: Prospects for Christians in the Path of Persecution
meta.description: Nina Shea and Samuel Tadros, both of Hudson Institute’s Center for Religious Freedom, joined His Grace Bishop Angaelos for an in-depth discussion of the threats facing the Coptic community. - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
